name: lookout/tracing
description: Distributed tracing, sampled performance spans (limits, Laravel collectors), optional browser RUM beacons, breadcrumbs, structured logs and custom metrics ingest, exception reporting with enrichment pipeline, cron check-ins, and profiling ingest for Lookout.

suggest.guzzlehttp/guzzle: Use Lookout\Tracing\Http\GuzzleTraceMiddleware or Psr18TraceClient for outgoing headers and spans.
suggest.psr/http-client: Use Lookout\Tracing\Http\Psr18TraceClient to wrap any PSR-18 HTTP client.
suggest.symfony/var-dumper: Required for dump() breadcrumbs when LOOKOUT_INSTRUMENT_DUMP is enabled (Laravel already includes it).
suggest.slim/slim: Wire Lookout\Tracing\Http\ContinueTracePsr15Middleware in a PSR-15 stack (also works with Mezzio and similar).
suggest.monolog/monolog: Use Lookout\Tracing\Logging\Monolog\LookoutMonologHandler to forward Monolog records to Lookout log ingest.
